/usr/bin/ar qc liblethe-core.a CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/bdf.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/boundary_conditions.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/dem_properties.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/density_model.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/dimensionality.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/evaporation_model.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/grids.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/ib_particle.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/ib_stencil.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/interface_tools.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/lethe_grid_tools.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/manifolds.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/mesh_controller.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/mobility_cahn_hilliard_model.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/mortar_coupling_manager.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/parameters.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/parameters_lagrangian.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/parameters_multiphysics.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/pvd_handler.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/rheological_model.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/serial_solid.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/shape.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/shape_parsing.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/simulation_control.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/solid_base.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/solid_objects_parameters.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/solutions_output.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/specific_heat_model.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/surface_tension_model.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/thermal_conductivity_model.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/thermal_expansion_model.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/tracer_diffusivity_model.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/tracer_reaction_model.cc.o CMakeFiles/lethe-core.dir/utilities.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib liblethe-core.a
